title: Gallant Tireless Altruist
description: This mod introduces GTA5-style kill effects and other screen visual enhancements.
body:
This mod introduces GTA5-style kill effects and other screen visual enhancements.

**Features**
- **Kill Effect**: Temporarily reduces screen saturation while increasing color brightness upon eliminating targets.
- **Special Damage Effect**: Briefly blurs the screen and adds a red vignette border when taking damage.
- **Optional**: Disables vanilla damage screen shake (enabled by default).

**Additional Notes**
- All features can be configured via configuration files.
- More granular customization options will be added in future updates.
- Additional GTA5-inspired visual features are planned for future releases.

![cover](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/a781d6a42599358c7f9c6d6be02227cacf401656.webp)
